description: NHL Vegas code VGK→las; 00:00Z kickoff dates to prior ET day; outcomes [away, home].

headlines.description: — Carolina spent the first part of the Stanley Cup Final surviving, finding ways to overcome deficits and play a high-scoring game that didn't fit the Hurricanes' typical style.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurricanes use stifling defense to blank Golden Knights 3-0 in Game 6 and win the Stanley Cup

video.headline: The Stanley Cup returns to Carolina! Canes dominate Game 6 for second title

espn.name: Carolina Hurricanes at Vegas Golden Knights

polymarket.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for June 14 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Hurricanes win, the market will resolve to "Hurricanes".
If the Golden Knights win, the market will resolve to "Golden Knights".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Carolina Hurricanes lead the Vegas Golden Knights 3-2 in the 2026 Stanley Cup Final after a 4-2 home win in Game 5 on June 11. The best-of-seven series heads to Game 6 on June 14 in Las Vegas, where the Golden Knights must win to force a decisive Game 7. Vegas holds home-ice advantage and has shown resilience with overtime victories earlier in the series, while Carolina has converted power-play opportunities effectively in recent contests. Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects the closely contested nature of the matchup, with implied probabilities near even on the moneyline amid roster health, goaltending matchups, and the high-stakes elimination pressure on the visiting side.
